name: MNCA 2
description: Deep feedback — CA mitosis drives the accumulator
code:
// Deep feedback — CA mitosis drives the accumulator
caStream('mnca_mitosis').out(o1)

noise(2, 0.02).rotate(()=>time*0.008)
  .mult(src(o1).add(solid(0.2, 0.15, 0.35), 0.7))
  .modulate(src(o1), 0.05)
  .color(0.3, 0.2, 0.5).brightness(0.03)
  .out(o2)

src(o0)
  .modulateRotate(src(o1), 0.03)
  .modulateScale(src(o1), 0.02)
  .blend(src(o2), 0.3)
  .modulateScale(noise(1.5, 0.025), 0.004)
  .hue(()=>0.004)
  .luma(0.005, 0.06)
  .brightness(0.022)
  .saturate(1.15)
  .contrast(1.02)
  .add(src(o1).mult(src(o2)), 0.12)
  .out(o0)
